title: Hand_Def Function
see_also:
Acquires whether the hand has been defined.

Hand_Type Function

Hand_Label$ Function

Hand_Number Function
examples:
' Display the label for hand 1 if set, display "Hand 1 is not defined" in the Run window if not set
If Hand_Def(1) = True Then Print Hand_Label$(1)
Else Print "Hand 1 is not defined"
EndIf
